description_long: This house features a modern, geometric design with clean lines and a flat roof, set on a rectangular grassy plot. The structure is composed of two main volumes, one larger and one smaller, both with rooftop terraces bordered by wooden railings. The facade is a striking combination of white, black, and wood-textured panels, with large windows and glass doors providing ample natural light. The rear of the house is elevated on stilts, creating an open space beneath the main living area and a wraparound deck. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some floor-to-ceiling glass sections and others smaller and more private. The entryway is understated, featuring a simple door beneath a small overhang, with no prominent steps or columns.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with geometric volumes, large windows, and rooftop terraces, featuring a mix of white, black, and wood textures. The rear is elevated on stilts with a wraparound deck.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, large windows, and the two-tiered structure with rooftop terraces.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated volume, asymmetrical window placement, and the wooden terrace railing.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the house elevated on stilts, a spacious wraparound deck, and extensive glass doors and windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the smaller volume, additional terrace space, and the open area beneath the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple door beneath a small overhang, no prominent steps or columns, minimalistic modern style
